title: Aurum PropTech sells two commercial towers in Navi Mumbai for Rs 112 crore
description: Aurum PropTech has announced the sale of two commercial towers in Navi Mumbai for a staggering Rs 112 crore, aligning with their forward-thinking vision of integrating AI technology into the real estate sector. By channeling significant resources into artificial intelligence, the company aims to enhance various aspects of property management, including tenant acquisition and dynamic pricing strategies.

title: European Coatings Podcast: From Excel to AI - the future of digital R&D
description: How will artificial intelligence change the way coatings are formulated? In the latest episode of the European Coatings Podcast, editor Yeray López speaks with Charles Jouanique, co founder of LabV, about the digital transformation of coatings R&D.
content: The discussion looks at why many laboratories still rely on Excel-based workflows and manual data handling, and how digital tools can help structure experimental data, reduce repetitive tasks and support faster innovation. Jouanique also highlights t... [949 chars]

title: Railways deploying AI-based inspection systems, drones, other technologies: Ashwini Vaishnaw

title: New AI Program at DTU Marries Machine Learning with Real-World Projects
description: Delhi Technological University, in collaboration with TimesPro, launches an Advanced Certificate Programme in Artificial Intelligence. The six-month course combines online learning, campus immersion, and practical projects in AI, ML, and DL. Aimed at professionals, the program nurtures industry-ready skills for emerging AI roles.
